programme.title: State of Grace, (1990, Crime)
programme.desc: In this neo-noir crime film, an undercover cop (Sean Penn) comes back to his old neighborhood in New York City's Hell's Kitchen to bring down the Irish Mafia, which is now led by two of his childhood friends (Gary Oldman and Ed Harris).

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Mob Town, (2019, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Four Brothers, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store hold-up, the Mercer bros reunite to take the matter into their own hands. As they track down the killer, they quickly realize that their old ways of doing business have new consequences.

programme.title: The Gambler, (2013, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Mob Town, (2019, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Four Brothers, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store hold-up, the Mercer bros reunite to take the matter into their own hands. As they track down the killer, they quickly realize that their old ways of doing business have new consequences.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Black Bear, (2020, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A director works on her latest screenplay at a cabin in the woods, where she witnesses (and accelerates) the deterioration of a marriage.

programme.title: Bodies Bodies Bodies, (2022, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: When a group of 20-somethings get stuck at a remote mansion during a hurricane, a party game gone very, very wrong ends with a dead body on the ground and fake friends at every turn as they try to find the killer among them.

programme.title: Green Room, (2016, Thriller)
programme.desc: After witnessing a shocking crime, a young rock band is unexpectedly thrust into a life-or-death battle to escape the clutches of a diabolical club owner (Patrick Stewart) and his ruthless henchmen in this white-knuckle thriller.

programme.title: Funny Games, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two violent young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic games with one another for their own amusement.

programme.title: Climax, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: When a dance troupe is lured to an empty school, a bowl of drug-laced sangria causes their jubilant rehearsal to descend into a dark and explosive nightmare as they try to survive the night—and find who's responsible—before it's too late.

programme.title: City of God, (2002, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed global hit film is a true story of crime and redemption set in one of the most notorious slums: Rio de Janeiro's "City of God."

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: Bull Durham, (1988, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a minor-league North Carolina baseball team (the Triple A Durham Bulls) and its attentive, intelligent groupie who feels it is her mission to live with one young player per season and help him mature.

programme.title: Showgirls, (1995, Drama)
programme.desc: Seduction, passion and power struggles unfold as the creators of Basic Instinct blow the lid off the seemingly glamorous world of Las Vegas showdancing in this controversial film that stars Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Jawbreaker, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: "The beautiful ones. The flawless four. Everyone wanted to be them. You know 'em". First there's Courtney "Satan-in-heels" Shayne and her pawn, the dense but dangerous Marcie Fox, a legend in her own little mind. Rated: R

programme.title: Idle Hands, (1999, Comedy)
programme.desc: The devil will find work for idle hands to do, but what happens when he chooses the laziest teen slacker in the world to do his dirty work? Anton Tobias is a couch potato burn-out who can't control the murderous impulses of his possessed hand. Rated: R

programme.title: The Faculty, (1998, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: Hudson Hawk, (1991, Heist Films)
programme.desc: Willis is Eddie "The Hawk" Hawkins, the world's most famous cat burglar, who, after 10 years in prison, is ready to go straight. But it's not going to be easy for The Hawk.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer, (1993, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Comedy sensation Mike Myers stars with Nancy Travis in this hatchet-driven romantic comedy about a wedlock-shy coffee house poet who finally meets the perfect woman. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: The Faculty, (1998, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: Searching For Bobby Fischer, (1993, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Josh is a typical seven-year-old who happens to be a chess prodigy. Josh’s father is determined to see his son become a champion. During their journey of discovery, they learn the one thing neither can afford to lose: their love for each other.

programme.title: In & Out, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far, (1977, War)
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.

programme.title: Force 10 From Navarone, (1978, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: A group of allied commandos on a mission against the 3rd Reich has orders to blow a giant dam in order to crush a strategic bridge held by the Nazis.

programme.title: White Lightning, (1973, Action)
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: King Kong, (1976, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A petroleum exploration expedition comes to an isolated island and encounters a colossal giant gorilla.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!
programme.sub-title: A Duel with Destiny Part 2: Kaiba vs. Ishizu

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the Shadows Part 1: Marik Vs. Bakura

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the Shadows Part 2: Marik Vs. Bakura

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!
programme.sub-title: Merger of the Big Five, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!
programme.sub-title: Merger of the Big Five, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?
programme.sub-title: Merger of the Big Five, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Family Gets Together! The Hellish Tea Party Starts!

programme.title: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Broken Couple! Sanji and Pudding Enter!

programme.title: All plans go into action as the moment of the wedding arrives - but as the veil is lifted on Pudding's grotesque face, all hell breaks loose and unexpected circumstances mean chaos at the altar! Meanwhile, Luffy charges in, adding to the mayhem!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Kiss! The Mission to Assassinate the Emperor Kicks Off!

programme.title: The plan is launched! Big Mom falls to pieces as the wedding - and the wedding cake - are destroyed and a slew of Luffys are wreaking havoc around the site. But just when Luffy gets in trouble, Jimbei confronts Big Mom bravely!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Returning the Sake Cup! The Manly Jimbei Pays His Debt!

programme.title: The plan is in full swing however - Big Mom is pushed past the edge of sanity and can't even bring herself to act. Meanwhile, her children make a move against Germa and Pudding takes up her original aim of killing Sanji!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Mission Failed?! The Big Mom Pirates Strike Back!

programme.title: The plot is in full swing as Luffy dashes towards Big Mom to show her the broken portrait again! Sanji makes an effort to free his family and wins the respect of his sister, and Big Mom loses her wits!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The tragic and sad history of Big Mom is revealed! From abandonment, rescue, and again to ruin, Big Mom's voracious hunger has brought her into conflict with others from the very beginning!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mom's Secret! The Giant's Island Elbaph and a Little Monster!

programme.title: Linlin enrages the Giants as she slays their respected warrior - but Mother throws herself on their mercy and begs for clemency for her beloved Linlin, forcing the troupe to leave Elbaph for good.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Birth of Mom! The Day That Carmel Vanished!

programme.title: Linlin, destroyed at the disappearance of Mother, falls in with a new cohort and finds a reason to go on living, proving herself a mighty force to be reckoned with! The Straw Hats' plan goes awry, and all hope looks to be lost!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Launcher Blasts! The Moment of Big Mom's Assassination!

programme.title: Bege and the Straw Hats are on the defensive as the full force of Mom's troops are brought down on them! As they retreat into a fortress, Germa 66 springs in to action! However, Bege has bad news for his allied forces.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 are cornered in Bege's stronghold - with the full force of the Big Mom Pirates pinning them down, it's only a matter of time before their defenses crack. The only way out seems to be to make a break for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cutting the Father-Son Relationship! Sanji and Judge!

programme.title: The plan is executed to sneak the Straw Hats out of Big Mom's castle while hidden inside Bege! But the irascible Luffy can't resist getting in at least one punch against his foe! Meanwhile, the Tamate Box slips into the hands of some surprising agent!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Escape From the Tea Party! Luffy vs. Big Mom!

programme.title: The full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much for the Straw Hats and Germa 66. With no other options, they decide to turn and fight, even though it means their total annihilation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Execution Begins! Luffy's Allied Forces Are Annihilated?!

programme.title: The Whole Cake Chateau starts crumbling while everyone is trying to escape for their lives! Luffy and the others get away and move on to the next stage of their escape, which involves some parting of ways.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Castle Collapses! The Straw Hat’s Great Escape Begins!

programme.title: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny! As Big Mom rages, her underlings decide to turn her Hunger Pang attacks against the Straw Hats! The Whole Cake Island scrambles to remake the cake to calm down Big Mom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Spear of Elbaph! Onslaught! The Flying Big Mom!

programme.title: Kingbaum puts his life on the line ferrying the Straw Hats towards the Seducing Woods! But Big Mom's word trumps him in this terrifying forest, and soon enough she catches up! Meanwhile, Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Pudding's Determination! Ablaze! The Seducing Woods!

programme.title: Zeus pursues the Straw Hats as Nami keeps him occupied. She has a shocking surprise in store for him, however, that might stop Big Mom in her tracks! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper find the Shark Submerge in a strange situation.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Lightning Counterattack! Nami and Zeus the Thundercloud!

programme.title: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats! Even being buried alive doesn't stop her! The plan to recreate the cake to stop her onslaught progresses, and Pudding's changeable heart confuses all those looking on!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Coincidental Reunion! Sanji and the Lovestruck Evil Pudding!

programme.title: Mama's onslaught continues as Pudding keeps battling the contradictory urges in her head - to kill or kiss Sanji! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper are at Perospero's mercy - and are being reduced to sweetened versions of themselves!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Sunny! Fighting Bravely! Chopper and Brook!

programme.title: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope is the Sunny's Coup-de-Burst! But can the Straw Hats prepare it in time? Meanwhile, Pedro comes face to face with his past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Before the Dawn! Pedro, the Captain of the Guardians!

programme.title: The last chance the Straw Hats have is the Coup de Burst! Pedro has made the ultimate sacrifice to give them this one chance to escape, but Big Mom's naval forces are closing in and poised to knock them out!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I'll Be Back! Luffy, Deadly Departure

programme.title: Nami and the others who escaped the Whole Cake Island by Pedro's sacrifice mourn over his death. Jimbei, however, keeps his calm, which makes Brook lose his temper. Meanwhile, Luffy confronts the formidable Sweet General Katakuri in the Mirroworld.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man with a Bounty of Billion! The Strongest Sweet General, Katakuri!

programme.title: Pudding and Sanji arrive at Cacao Island and begin to remake the only cake that will calm Big Mom! But their fake nuptials get in the way as they bicker like a married couple! Meanwhile, Luffy has lost the battle of his life.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Hard Battle Starts! Luffy vs. Katakuri!

programme.title: Luffy keeps the forces out to destroy the Straw Hats at bay, however the crew needs to destroy all the mirrors - the final link that secure his safe return - on the ship in order to save themselves!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Green Room! An Invincible Helmsman, Jimbei!

programme.title: Nami and the others start breaking all the mirrors on the Sunny in order to keep their enemies out while she and Luffy discuss where to rendezvous – but little do they know the plan is overheard!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Threat of the Mole! Luffy’s Silent Fight!

programme.title: Both powerful combatants and strong users of Haki, Luffy and Katakuri are a dead match for each other. Every move is matched by their opponent! Elsewhere, the Big Mom Pirates square off against Germa!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Deadly Battle?! Katakuri's Awakening in Anger!

programme.title: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy the merienda - a chance for him to savor the sweetness of his crew of chefs and replenish his Haki!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy discovers the secret to Katakuri's unearthly fighting ability, and just might have a solution for how to stop him! Meanwhile, at the Sweets Factory, Pudding receives a call from Brulee who has bad news for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Fights Back! The Invincible Katakuri's Weak Point!

programme.title: Luffy runs out of his Haki and has to buy some time - in the most peculiar way! Meanwhile the Big Mom Pirates mobilize their entire fleet to squelch the pirate threat, and the replacement cake nears completion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Another Crisis! Gear Four vs. Unstoppable Donuts!

programme.title: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing himself to his enemies! Meanwhile, Luffy uses Brulee as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rebellious Daughter, Chiffon! Sanji's Big Plan for Transporting the Cake!

programme.title: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Man's Way of Life! Bege and Luffy's Determination as Captains!

programme.title: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Cake Sank?! Sanji and Bege's Getaway Battle!

programme.title: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Automata, (2014, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jacq Vaucan (Antonio Banderas, 'The Mask of Zorro') is an insurance agent of ROC robotics corporation who investigates cases of robots violating their primary protocols against altering themselves.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City, (2005, Comic Books and Superheroes)
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: Criminal, (2016, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into an unpredictable and dangerous convict in order to complete the agent's final assignment.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled), (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: Barbed Wire, (1952, Drama)
programme.desc: In 1878, Gene Autry is a cattle buyer who tries to settle a battle between the cattlemen and homesteaders, when the latter are worked up into a feverish pitch by unscrupulous landowner Steve Rutledge.

programme.title: The Rainmaker, (1965, Drama)
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: The Kentuckian, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass, (1975, Drama)
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The White Buffalo, (1977, Western)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Chato's Land, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High, (1968, Western)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Man With The Gun, (1955, Drama)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation, (2013, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: The greatest American Heroes are back and they've been set up to take the fall for a heinous crime they didn't commit. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) leads a new team (including Channing Tatum and Bruce Willis) on this high-octane adventure.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' heart-racing sci-fi adventure Zathura, two squabbling brothers are propelled into deepest, darkest space while playing a mysterious game they discovered in the basement of their old house.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra, (2009, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: They are G.I. Joe, a top-secret elite strike force featuring the best operatives from around the globe. After a secret weapon is stolen by the evil Cobra, the G.I. Joes must stop Cobra from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation, (2013, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: The greatest American Heroes are back and they've been set up to take the fall for a heinous crime they didn't commit. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) leads a new team (including Channing Tatum and Bruce Willis) on this high-octane adventure.

programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is clumsy at times and a bit of a crybaby. Luna, a black cat with a crescent moon on her forehead, gives Usagi a miracle brooch.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi becomes close with Ami Mizuno, a genius with an IQ of 300. But there's something odd about the students at Ami's seminar.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Disturbing rumors about a certain bus swirl all around Usagi. Amid the rumors, Usagi meets a beautiful shrine maiden with black hair named Rei Hino.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns of a secret treasure exhibit and, suspecting it might be the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' sneaks into the embassy of Kingdom D.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: All of Juban Middle School is talking about the 'cursed bridal shop,' where every man who visits is said to disappear.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is reported to have committed many crimes to obtain the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' but Usagi doesn't believe it…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns Tuxedo Mask's identity is actually Mamoru Chiba. Meanwhile, brainwashed people in Usagi's town wander around looking for Sailor Moon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The one who saved Sailor Moon was actually Sailor V. Sailor V aka Minako Aino heads to the Tokyo Tower to settle things with Kunzite but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: While trying to protect Sailor Moon, Tuxedo Mask loses consciousness. Out of sorrow, Sailor Moon awakens as Princess Serenity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others land on the moon to solve the mystery of the Legendary Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Appearing before a devastated Usagi is a man who looks just like Mamoru but goes by 'Endo'. Usagi sees traces of Mamoru and thus approaches him…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: To end her painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon must destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the Legendary Silver Crystal is finally released.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions and learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others decide to go to the 30th century, where Chibi-Usa came from. Waiting for them there is the solitary Guardian Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Mamoru's future self, King Endymion, appears before Sailor Moon and her friends. He reveals a shocking fact about Planet Earth in the future.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Captured by Dimande, Usagi loses her transformation powers. Meanwhile, Chibi-Usa feels helpless and goes to see Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others are stunned to learn Chibi-Usa's real identity is Black Lady. And finally, Wiseman's own identity is revealed.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução. programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doroteo confessa a Gabito que está disposto a tudo por Georgina, até mesmo se casar com ela. Só precisa acertar alguns detalhes para conquistá-la de vez. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Billy e Jimmy conhecem uma poderosa mestre do chi chamado Su Lien e seu aluno de lutador de sumô, Tsunami. Su Lien é enganada pelo Mestre das Sombras e Tsunami e os irmãos Lee precisam se unir para resgatá-la. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor em Ritmo de Dança, (1970)

programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Sugarcreek, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pai e filho fugindo de uma tragédia chocante e brutal se instalam na cidade predominantemente amish de Sugarcreek, Ohio. Eles são acolhidos por três irmãs que oferecem ao pai um trabalho de faz-tudo, mas uma policial local começa a desconfiar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Receitas do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um chef desmorona após a morte de sua esposa, mas tenta colocar sua vida em ordem convertendo um "pub" rural em um restaurante gourmet. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Reserve o Dia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sarah decide terminar um longo namoro, ao mesmo tempo em que sua irmã Beth planeja se casar. Presa entre o desamor e a ilusão de um casamento, Sarah começa a buscar o verdadeiro significado do amor. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Carol, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Therese Belivet tem um emprego entediante em uma loja de departamentos. Um dia, ela conhece Carol, uma elegante e misteriosa cliente. Rapidamente, as duas mulheres desenvolvem um vínculo amoroso que terá consequências sérias. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Greta, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma adolescente rebelde e suicida é enviada para a casa de seus avós no verão, onde sua vida toma um rumo inesperado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Uma terapeuta de casais descobre que seus pais estão se divorciando e tenta salvar o casamento deles. Ao se dar conta de que seus esforços não estão adiantando, ela começa a questionar o próprio casamento e sua profissão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Greta, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma adolescente rebelde e suicida é enviada para a casa de seus avós no verão, onde sua vida toma um rumo inesperado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: As Origens do Universo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O mundo que nos rodeia contém muitos sistemas complexos que funcionam perfeitamente juntos. Durante muitos anos, houve um debate acalorado entre evolução e criação, com a questão central de tudo: a Terra foi criada ou surgiu por conta própria. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Colheita, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para escapar de seus problemas conjugais, uma jovem família viaja da cidade para passar o verão em um vilarejo Amish, que está tomado por uma presença malévola. Os visitantes logo descobrem que foram trazidos para lá por uma razão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Beatriz visita Rômulo justo quando Aidé está com ele no quarto do hotel; ao ver Beatriz beijando Rômulo, Aidé diz que está sobrando ali e se retira. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda diz a Livi que o tipo de homem por quem ela deveria estar apaixonada é alguém como Armando; Livi não gosta disso e avisa que não é certo iludir Armando. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após um longo tempo separados, Rodrigo e Matilda se reencontram na universidade. A atração entre os dois ainda é forte e eles não conseguem ficar afastados. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Brela e Gabito estão em um momento especial, brindando por seus planos e possível casamento, e aparece a única pessoa capaz de estragar tudo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Bons pra Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Almôndega e Cassie, dois cães de estimação, precisam superar suas diferenças para evitar que ladrões assaltem a casa dos seus donos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Muito Bem Acompanhada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para fazer ciúmes ao ex-namorado e forjar uma vida romântica de sucesso, uma mulher contrata um garoto de programa para acompanhá-la ao casamento de sua irmã mais nova em Londres. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Somos Jovens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Josh e Cornelia são um casal de quarentões que decide passar mais tempo com um casal mais jovem que eles. Apesar da juventude e gosto pelo cinema alimentar este novo vínculo, as suspeitas sobre a honestidade do rapaz começam a pesar. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: À Espera da Chuva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte misteriosa de seu pai, uma jornalista volta à sua cidade natal no interior. Ao chegar, descobre que o local está devastado pela seca e se tornou um lugar atormentado por gangues e os maus efeitos da pobreza extrema. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Arn - O Cavaleiro Templário, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Arn foi criado para ser um monge e um bravo guerreiro. Ao deixar sua terra, em meio à guerra entre cristãos e muçulmanos, ele conhece Cecília e se apaixona, porém, Arn é enviado para lutar na Terra Santa como um cavaleiro templário. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Voo do Falcão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante o século XIII, um pequeno vilarejo luta por liberdade contra invasores mongóis. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Verdade e Justiça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1870, na Estônia, o jovem Andrés, juntamente com sua esposa, chega a uma fazenda para estabelecer sua nova vida. Desolada e negligenciada entre os pântanos, a propriedade deve ser transformada em um lugar que abrigará a família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Reino Gelado 3 - Fogo e Gelo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O raro talento de se meter em problemas é o legado da família de Kai e Gerda. Crescidos, os irmãos se metem em um desastre de proporções globais, tudo para encontrar seus pais que estão desaparecidos após serem levados pelo Vento do Norte. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2020. Com o desejo de ver Nawaki e Dan, Tsunade quase aceita o acordo tentador de Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Interrupção ... O Acordo Acabou ! - T01E93

programme.title: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto usam um jutsu de invocação para chamar uma cobra gigante. Ainda drogado e incapaz de usar seu chacra, Jiraiya invoca o pequeno Gamakichi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Atacar! A Fúria Do Rasengan! - T01E94

programme.title: 2020. Um ninja como Naruto nunca volta atrás na sua palavra. Naruto é seriamente ferido por Kabuto e está à beira da morte. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Quinto Hokage ... Apostando A Vida
programme.desc: Naruto: O Quinto Hokage ... Apostando A Vida - T01E95

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya, Tsunade e Orochimaru soltam um jutsu de invocação. Uma batalha intensa começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Paralisação Completa !O Fim Do Sannin! - T01E96

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade, Naruto e os outros começam a voltar à Aldeia da Folha, onde Tsunade se tornará oficialmente no Quinto Hokage. Tsunade pede para parar num aldeia com fontes termais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Seqüestrado!A Aventura De Naruto Nas Fontes Termais
programme.desc: Naruto: Seqüestrado!A Aventura De Naruto Nas Fontes Termais - T01E97

programme.title: 2020. Naruto pede a Tsunade curar Sasuke e Lee antes dela se tornar no Hokage. Após examinar Lee, ela diz a ele que encontre outro caminho que não seja de um shinobi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais! - T01E98

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade pergunta a Lee se ele quer desistir do caminho de um ninja ou ter uma cirurgia arriscada, com apenas 50% de chance de ser bem-sucedida. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima! - T01E99

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade aconselha a Lee que desista do caminho de um shinobi, e Lee relembra do seu primeiro encontro com seu professor, Guy. Incapaz de dominar nenhum ninjutsu ou genjutsu, Lee sempre foi desprezado pelos outros. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi!
programme.desc: Naruto: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi! - T01E100

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe sempre quiseram ver o rosto por trás da máscara de Kakashi. Os três fazem de tudo para ver. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei!
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei! - T01E101

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura recebem uma missão B e vão para a região vizinha, a Terra do Chá. Eles devem proteger os corredores numa corrida, que acontece a cada quatro anos durante o ritual cerimonial do Santuário Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá!
programme.desc: Naruto: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá! - T01E102

programme.title: 2020. Os chefes da aldeia acreditam que Idate criou uma farsa do grande festival tradicional. Jirocho acredita que Idate fugiu com um plano em mente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Corrida Começou !Problemas Em Alto-Mar ! - T01E103

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe conseguem alcançar Idate, que está ferido e inconsciente, perto de Aoi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda !
programme.desc: Naruto: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda ! - T01E104

programme.title: 2020. Mesmo com a interferência de Aoi, Idate não para de correr. Idate não confia em ninguém ainda, e é revelado que durante a Prova Chunin, o irmão mais velho de Idate foi o examinador quem fez a décima pergunta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante - T01E105

programme.title: 2020. O chefe Jirocho espera, confiante na vitória de Idate. Mas Aoi, o ninja enviado pelo clã Wagarashi, bloqueia o caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Último Arranco : Um Ato Final De Desespero.
programme.desc: Naruto: O Último Arranco : Um Ato Final De Desespero. - T01E106

programme.title: 2020. Shikamaru é promovido a chunin e comemora em um restaurante com sua equipe. No hospital, Lee decide em ter a cirurgia perigosa para curar seu corpo e continuar sendo um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Começa: Naruto Contra Sasuke !
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Começa: Naruto Contra Sasuke ! - T01E107

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke usam suas melhores armas um contra o outro, e Kakashi chega para parar a luta bem a tempo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Rivais Amargos E Laços Desfeitos - T01E108

programme.title: 2020. Os Quatro Ninja do Som, Kidomaru, Sakon, Jirobo e Tayuya, aparecem de repente diante de Sasuke. Sakura fica preocupada com a Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, colocada por Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Convite Do Som. - T01E109

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke ignora as súplicas de Sakura e deixa a Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Ao saber disso, Tsunade invoca Shikamaru para liderá-lo em sua primeira missão como chunin. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Formação!A Equipe De Resgate De Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação!A Equipe De Resgate De Sasuke - T01E110

programme.title: 2020. Os Quatro Ninja do Som correm em direção à toca de Orochimaru com Sasuke. Eles são descobertos e desafiados pelos jonin Genma e Raido. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Som Contra Folha - T01E111

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros estão presos na prisão cúpula de terra de Jirobo. Eles tentam achar uma saída, mas as paredes regeneram cada vez que são destruídas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Motim Na Equipe : Tudo Se Desfaz !
programme.desc: Naruto: Motim Na Equipe : Tudo Se Desfaz ! - T01E112

programme.title: 2020. Após serem liberados da prisão cúpula de terra, Shikamaru e os outros vão atrás dos ninjas do Som restantes enquanto Choji fica para trás. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Força Total !Choji, Detona! - T01E113

programme.title: 2020. Choji consome a pílula amarela e parece que vai vencer a batalha, mas Jirobo se tranforma no segundo estágio e ganha imenso poder. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Adeus Velho Amigo ! Eu Sempre Acreditarei Em Você.
programme.desc: Naruto: Adeus Velho Amigo ! Eu Sempre Acreditarei Em Você. - T01E114

programme.title: 2020. Assumindo que a equipe da Folha não conseguirá passar por Jirobo, os restantes ninjas do Som não colocam armadilhas pelo caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Seu Oponente Sou Eu! - T01E115

programme.title: 2020. Neji encara Kidomaru enquanto os outros continuam procurando Sasuke e os restantes ninjas do Som. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: 360 Graus De Visão: O Ponto Cego Do Byakugan!
programme.desc: Naruto: 360 Graus De Visão: O Ponto Cego Do Byakugan! - T01E116

programme.title: 2020. Kidomaru muda de tática e cria um arco e flecha para atacar o ponto cego de Neji. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Perder Não É Uma Opção! - T01E117

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08
programme.desc: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E12
programme.desc: 1995. Depois de serem instruídos por Dhalsim a se dirigir ao templo proibido, Ryu e Ken encontram duas estátuas aparentemente indestrutíveis. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kōji Tsujitani, Kenji Haga, Chisa Yokoyama, Tesshō Genda, Kenji Utsumi, Ryōichi Tanaka Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E202
programme.desc: 2021. Usando a Técnica de Transporte, Sasuke chega a um local estranho coberto de inscrições misteriosas. Lá ele encontra muitas coisas surpreendentes sobre o Clã Otsutsuki. programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Not the Best Man
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) is prompted to tell Steve (Steve Harvey) how she really feels about him while at her best friend's wedding.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Addicted to Love and Whatnot
programme.desc: Regina agrees to a date with Steve's friend (Jonathan Slocum) if Steve will return the favor to one of hers.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Last Dance
programme.desc: Steve tries to help Regina overcome painful prom memories; Bullethead wins a date with a celebrity (Teena Marie) in a radio contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: Cedric and Lovita (Cedric the Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn) conspire to bring the romantically impaired Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson) together.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Negotiator
programme.desc: The kids boycott the student-faculty talent show after the childish adults become a tad too competitive.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - After the Fall
programme.desc: The gang is interviewed for a TV documentary about Steve's career path from RAndB performer to vice principal.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Secret Lovers
programme.desc: When Bullethead catches Steve and Regina in a compromising position, students start gossiping about their once-secret affair.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Do Not Duplicate
programme.desc: Lovita convinces Steve to give Regina a key to his apartment instead of jewelry, but Regina is unimpressed with the gesture.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation And Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - As it Happens...
programme.desc: Whether the moment demands it or you're intentionally focused, be present.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Small Bites and Kicked Up Cocktails
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a Sunday dinner; it's a homestyle recipe for slow-simmered short ribs and gravy served along with collard green and cabbage mix that's tender and well seasoned.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - A Taste of Brazil
programme.desc: Yo-Yo gives a taste of Brazil's culture through the food, with some traditional, flavorful dishes; she cooks up a Moqueca, which is a Brazilian seafood Stew; toasted homemade garlic bread; a traditional Brazilian drink called the caipirinha.

programme.title: If You Really Love Me
programme.desc: The deceased mother of three women returns to Earth as an angel to help them rediscover what is truly important in life.

programme.title: Love Will Find a Way
programme.desc: Reggie's search for love continues in Paris with Troy and Piper.

programme.title: Family Time - Daddy Divorce
programme.desc: Thanksgiving is approaching, and family members come bearing more than just luggage.

programme.title: Family Time - Blasts From The Past
programme.desc: Lisa needs help for an upcoming catering gig, so Vivian recruits her former cellmate; Rachel reunites with an unlikely relative.

programme.title: Family Time - Christmas Beyond The Walls
programme.desc: The Stallworths host their talented cousins for the holidays; Cheryl makes her move on Donnie.

programme.title: Family Time - Stallworth Murder Mystery
programme.desc: The Stallworth family rings in the New Year with a murder mystery game; Donnie and Cheryl further explore their chemistry together.

programme.title: Family Time - There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Anthony, a construction worker, wins $500,000 in the lottery, enabling him to move his family to a middle-class neighborhood.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - For Whom the Belt Tolls
programme.desc: Wanda learns about Bernie's secret discipline-keeping device; its power corrupts her.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Pop Pop Goes the Weasel
programme.desc: When Bryana's father, Bryan, visits, he threatens Bernie's relationship with Jordan and undermines Bernie's barbecuing techniques.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Prison Break
programme.desc: Bernie realizes his punishment system is no longer effective, so he puts the kids into a total lockdown.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Some Church Bull
programme.desc: In an effort to bring family members closer, Wanda insists they participate in the annual parish retreat.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sorely Missed
programme.desc: When Bernie and Wanda find themselves spending all of their time with the kids, Bernie decides they need some time alone.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Daddy
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) reluctantly allows Romeo (Merlin Santana) to move in while finishing out his senior year of high school.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Me, Me and Miss Jones
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo (Steve Harvey, Merlin Santana) become rivals for the affections of a 25-year-old swimsuit model.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - No Free Samples
programme.desc: Rap artist Lil' Bow Wow (guest starring as himself) wants to sample an old hit of Steve's (Steve Harvey) group, the Hi-Tops. Jermaine Dupri and Ron Isley also guest star.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Mother and Child Reunion
programme.desc: Romeo's mother shows up and announces that she is leaving her husband to start a new life in Chicago.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - The Other Side of Pain
programme.desc: Trauma recovery requires safety, processing and integration.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Anxiously Ever After
